# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Key Frames

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and displays the Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos. It then transitions to a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, emphasizing the importance of high-quality data. The narration explains the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include waveform animations representing audio data and shots of a data center and server racks, highlighting the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

Summary.valueString: The video shifts to vibrant in-game footage from Flight Simulator, showcasing a red biplane flying over a coastal city with turquoise waters and a mountainous landscape. The scene transitions to a detailed castle surrounded by greenery and mountains, with the plane flying nearby. This segment highlights the realistic and immersive environments created in the simulator.

contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:23.100 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The focus returns to the discussion of TTS technology, with a new speaker explaining the high fidelity and human-like quality of the cognitive services' voice offerings. The background shows an office setting with modern decor. The narration is interspersed with realistic airport ground operations footage, including close-ups of an Airbus airplane, ground crew directing the plane with lighted wands, and airport runway scenes. The segment ends with the Microsoft logo on a black screen.

transcriptPhrases.text: What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

transcriptPhrases.text: Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.
